name: Labubu Tic Tac Toe
description: Labubu Tic Tac Toe takes the classic 3×3 tic-tac-toe board and adds a fun Labubu twist! Two players compete on the same grid, placing Labubu heads as they try to line up three in a row. Sounds simple? It is. But it’s also incredibly addictive and fun to play!
instructions: The goal of the game is simple place three Labubu symbols in a row before your opponent does Line them up horizontally vertically or diagonally to win If all nine squares are filled and no one has three in a row the game ends in a draw Reset the bo
